timestamp.description: holds the information of the time when the current record was created/updated

userId.description: the id of the user, which interacts with the current record

serviceId.description: the id of the service, which interacts with the current record

name.description: the used name for the key
the used name for the key

structureId.description: id of the structure where the element is located

elementTypeId.description: id of the element type from which the element was created

linkedElementIds.description: represent the links to other elements

groupId.description: unique id of the Group associated with the GroupPermission

permissions.description: a list of permissions assigned to the group

isBuilding.description: whether the dataroom is a building or not

indexId.description: id of the index the dataroom was created from

structureId.description: id of the structure the dataroom is appended to

elementId.description: unique id of the attached element

dataroomId.description: id of the dataroom the folder was built in

items.description: id(s) of the folders that are parents of that folder

isPinned.description: document is uploaded by user to the dataroom folder

isDataroomCompliant.description: whether the documentlink is in corrent folder

parentFolderIds.description: ids of the parentfolders sorted by level

imageUrl.description: URL of the icon of the structure

dataroomIds.description: a list of blueprint-ID's associated with the structure

isActive.description: whether the index is active or inactive

structureId.description: id of the structure in which the document is located

name.description: this field holds the name information of the document

mimeType.description: information of the detected mime type of the uploaded binary file

originalName.description: the original name keeps the information about the name of the document at the time of uploading.

documentTypeId.description: this field holds the document type found by Evana AI.

size.description: size shows the size of the binary file in byte

pages.description: holds the information, how many pages the uploaded document contains

sourcePath.description: this value allows you to specify the data source from which the document was originally uploaded.

hasGdprRelevance.description: marks the document as GDPR relevant

deletionDeadline.description: sets the date on which the document is automatically deleted

archiveDate.description: sets the date on which the document is automatically archived

isArchived.description: defines if a document is archived

isTransactional.description: defines a document as transaction relevant

isMultiDocument.description: if this field is set, more than one documen type was found during the analysis process.

securityClassificationId.description: defines the used security classification which can be adjusted in the clients area

elementIds.description: contains information about all linked elements of the document. These elements are used to sort the document in datarooms.

id.description: unique identifier of the user object

groups.description: groups of which the user is part of

structureId.description: id of the structure, where the new element should be created

elementTypeId.description: id of the element type, from which the element is to be created

synonyms.description: alternative names for the element that can be set

dataModelId.description: id of the data model, which is used to create the element

linkedElementIds.description: ids of elements, which should be linked to the element

name.description: the name of the element to be updated

synonyms.description: alternative names for the element that can be set

linkedElementIds.description: ids of elements, which could be linked to the element

name.description: name which used to update the requested document name

documentTypeId.description:
id of the documentType which should be set to document

Attention
this will be change the datamodel and keys as well

gdprRelevance.description: set a document as gdpr relevant

deletionDeadline.description:
set a the deadline of a document

Used Format
YYYY-MM-DD

archiveDate.description:
set a the archive date of a document

Used Format
YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ

isArchive.description: set or remove a document archive status

securityClassificationId.description: set a security classification a document

elementIds.description: Comma separated string containing ids of the elements that can be linked to the document.

indexes.description: a list of blueprint-ID's associated with the structure

indexId.description: id of the index the dataroom is created from

groupId.description: unique id of the Group associated with the GroupPermission

permissions.description: a list of permissions assigned to the group

parentId.description: id of the ParentFolder, where the new fodler should be created

401.description: You are not authorized to peform this request

404.description: Not Found, requested record does not exist or you do not have access to it

415.description: Invalid content-type, the send content-type cannot be processed

428.description: Precondition Required, one or more conditions for the attempted action are not fulfilled

502.description: The requested domain endpoint is temporary not available

get.summary: Delivers the user regarding the requested id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the requested user

patch.summary: Partially updates the user regarding the requested id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the requested user

get.summary: Delivers all available elements which are available for the current user. to narrow down the search result, the search parameters can be used

parameters.name: name
parameters.description:
filters the elements according to the transmitted name.

Sample
name=Tenant.
All elements are found that have Tenant in their name.

parameters.name: structureId
parameters.description:
filters the elements according to the transmitted structureId.

Sample
structureId=5eb18e60f27d0d1969d74c03.
All elements which located under this structure id will be found.

parameters.name: elementTypeId
parameters.description:
filters the elements according to the transmitted elementTypeId.

Sample
elementTypeId=5eb18f60f37d0d2969d74c03.
All elements which linked with the elementTypeId

parameters.name: externalId
parameters.description:
filters the elements according to the transmitted externalId.

Sample
externalId=any123.
All elements linked with the externalId

parameters.name: linkedElementIds
parameters.description:
filters the elements according to the transmitted linkedElementIds.

Sample
linkedElementIds=5ec18f60f37d0d2179d74c03,5eb18f60f37d0d2169d74c14.
All elements linked to these elements (linkedElementIds) are found

parameters.name: elementIds
parameters.description:
filters the elements according to the transmitted elementIds.

Sample
linkedElementIds=5eb18f60f37d0d2179d74c03,5eb18f60f37d0d4169d74c14.
All elements corresponding to the given ids should be found

parameters.name: childs
parameters.description: if this value is set, all child structures are included in the search. this filtering is only available in combination with a set structureId otherwise it is ignored.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: limit of records which returned per request

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: starting point of the result set of the search, based from the set limit

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: sort by selected field

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: order of the result descending or ascending

post.summary: A element will be created at a specified structure

get.summary: Delivers the element which are available for the current user regarding the requested id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the requested element

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the requested element

delete.summary: Based on the access rights of the user, an attempt is made to delete an element based on the passt id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the element which should be deleted

200.description: information on whether the deletion was successful

get.summary: Delivers all available documents which are available for the current user. to narrow down the search result, the search parameters can be used

parameters.name: structureId
parameters.description:
filters the documents according to the transmitted structureId.

Sample
structureId=5eb18e60f27d0d1969d74c03.
All documents which located under this structure id will be found.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description:
filters the documents according to the transmitted name.

Sample
name=Tenant.
All documents are found have tenant in their name.

parameters.name: archiveDateFrom
parameters.description:
filters the documents with archived date on or after the specified date

Used Format
Format the date using ISO 8601 standard (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: archiveDateTo
parameters.description:
filters the documents with archived date on or before the specified date

Used Format
Format the date using ISO 8601 standard (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: hasGdprRelevance
parameters.description: only documents flaged as gdpr relevant are returned

parameters.name: isMultiDocument
parameters.description: only documents flaged as multi document will be returned

parameters.name: deletionDeadline
parameters.description: filters all documents with a active deletion deadline

parameters.name: elementIds
parameters.description:
filters the documents according to the transmitted elementIds.

Sample
elementIds=5ec18f60f37d0d2179d74c03,5eb18f60f37d0d2169d74c14.
All elements linked to these elements (linkedElementIds) are found

parameters.name: documentTypeIds
parameters.description:
filters the documents according to the transmitted documentTypeIds.

Sample
documentTypeIds=5eb18f60f37d0d2969d74c03,3eb18f60f31d0d2979d74c04.
All documents includes the requested document type ids

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: limit of records which returned per request

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: starting point of the result set of the search, based from the set limit

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: sort by selected field

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: order of the result descending or ascending

parameters.name: externalId
parameters.description:
filters the elements according to the transmitted externalId.

Sample
externalId=any123.
All elements linked with the externalId

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Contains a user email address for additional user context in combination with a service access token. This is required in case of a service request

get.summary: Delivers the document which are available for the current user regarding the requested id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the requested document

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the document which will be updated

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Contains a user email address for additional user context in combination with a service access token. This is required in case of a service request

delete.summary: Based on the access rights of the user, an attempt is made to delete an document based on the passt id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the document which should be deleted

200.description: information on whether the deletion was successful

put.summary: Based on the access rights of the user, allows to move a document to a new structure

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Contains an id of the document which should be moved

parameters.name: structureId
parameters.description: Contains an id of the structure, where the document should be moved

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Contains a user email address for additional user context in combination with a service access token. This is required in case of a service request

get.summary: Delivers a set of available structures which are available for the current user. to narrow down the search result, the search parameters can be used

parameters.name: name
parameters.description:
filters the structures according to the transmitted name.

Sample
name=StructureName.
All structures are found that have StructureName in their name.

parameters.name: parentId
parameters.description:
filters the structures according to the transmitted parentId.

Sample
structureId=6424160e4e3be944775da217.
All structures, which are located directly under the structure with the provided id, will be found.

parameters.name: showAdjacentStructuresOnly
parameters.description: filters the records so that all returned structures are on the same level

parameters.name: externalId
parameters.description:
filters the structures [.external.id] according to the transmitted externalId.

Sample
externalId=any.
All structures, which have the same external.id value will be found.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: limit of records which are returned per request

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: starting point of the result set of the search, based from the set limit

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: sort by selected field

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: order of the result descending or ascending

get.summary: Delivers the structure which is available for the current user regarding the requested id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the requested structure

patch.summary: updates the structure name and/or priority which are available for the current user regarding the requested id

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the requested structure

delete.summary: Based on the access rights of the user, an attempt is made to delete a structure based on the passed id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the structure which should be deleted

200.description: information on whether the deletion was successful

put.summary: Adds a image/icon to the structure

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the structure to which to add the image to

delete.summary: Removes a image/icon from the structure

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the structure from which to remove the image from

post.summary: Adds a dataroom to the structure

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the structure to which to add the dataroom to

delete.summary: Removes a dataroom from the structure

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the structure from which to remove the dataroom

parameters.name: dataroomId
parameters.description: the id of the dataroom that will be removed from the structure.

get.summary: Delivers a set of available indices which are available for the current user. To narrow down the search result, the search parameters can be used

parameters.name: name
parameters.description:
filters the indices according to the transmitted name.

Sample
name=IndexName.
All indices are found that have IndexName in their name.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: limit of records which are returned per request

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: starting point of the result set of the search, based from the set limit

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: sort by selected field

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: order of the result descending or ascending

get.summary: Delivers the index which is available for the current user regarding the requested id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the index

put.summary: Replaces or adds a group to the structure

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the structure to which to add groups to

delete.summary: Removes a group from the structure

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the structure to which to add groups to

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: id of the group to remove

get.summary: Delivers a set of available datarooms which are available for the current user. To narrow down the search result, the search parameters can be used.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filters the datarooms according to the transmitted name. All datarooms are found that have DataroomName in their name.

parameters.name: structureId
parameters.description: Filters the datarooms according to the transmitted structureId. All datarooms are found that are part of the structure with the provided structureId.

parameters.name: indexId
parameters.description: Filters the datarooms according to the transmitted indexId. All datarooms are found that are direct children of the index with the provided indexId.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: limit of records which are returned per request

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: starting point of the result set of the search, based from the set limit

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: sort by selected field

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: order of the result descending or ascending

get.summary: Delivers the dataroom which is available for the current user regarding the requested id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the dataroom

post.summary: A folder will be created at a specified parentFolderId

get.summary: Delivers a set of folders which are available for the current user. At least one query param must be provided

parameters.name: folderPath
parameters.description: Filters the Folders according to the transmitted path. All folders are found that are childs of the folder with the provided path.

parameters.name: dataroomId
parameters.description: Filters the Folders according to the transmitted dataroomId. All Folders are found that are direct children of the dataroom with the provided dataroomId.

parameters.name: elementId
parameters.description: Filters the Folders according to the transmitted elementId. All Folders are found that are attached with the provided elementId.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: limit of records which are returned per request

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: starting point of the result set of the search, based from the set limit

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: sort by selected field

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: order of the result descending or ascending

get.summary: Delivers the Folder which is available for the current user regarding the requested id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the Folder

delete.summary: Based on the access rights of the user, an attempt is made to delete a folder based on the passed id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the folder which should be deleted

200.description: information on whether the deletion was successful

get.summary: Delivers a set of available documentLinks which are available for the current user. To narrow down the search result, the search parameters can be used.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: Filters the documentLinks according to the transmitted folderId. All documentLinks are found that are part of the folder with the provided folderId.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: Filters the documentLinks according to the transmitted documentId. All documentLinks are found that are part of the document with the provided documentId.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: limit of records which are returned per request

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: starting point of the result set of the search, based from the set limit

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: sort by selected field

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: order of the result descending or ascending

get.summary: Delivers the documentLink which is available for the current user regarding the requested id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the documentLink

delete.summary: Based on the access rights of the user, an attempt is made to delete a documentLink based on the passed id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: id of the documentLink which should be deleted

200.description: information on whether the deletion was successful

get.summary: Delivers a set of available elementTypes which are available for the current user. To narrow down the search result, the search parameters can be used.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filters the elementTypes according to the transmitted name. All elementTypes are found that have DataroomName in one of their names (translations).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: limit of records which are returned per request

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: starting point of the result set of the search, based from the set limit

parameters.name: order
